brandSubtitle: A unified operations entry point for real networks, bringing device management, observability, configuration orchestration, authentication audit, and data-center networking into one platform.
vpTopologyDesc: Unify devices, sites, links, vendors, credentials, and relationships into durable context for multi-device operations
vpDevicesDesc: Bring together metrics, logs, flows, Telemetry, and alert events for inspection, troubleshooting, capacity, and reliability analysis
vpRealtimeDesc: Coordinate configuration orchestration, authentication policies, change audit, and automation flows as a traceable operations loop
protocolEcosystem: Designed to grow across protocols and data-center networking scenarios
subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system
loginFailed: Login failed, please check your credentials
registerSubtitle: Register a new account to use NetLab Network Management Center
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your registered email to receive a verification code
resetPasswordSuccess: Password reset successful. Please sign in with your new password
verifyCodeInvalid: Invalid verification code, please try again
passkeyHint: Supports Touch ID, Face ID, Windows Hello, and security keys
securityUpdateSubtitle: {{username}}, complete the required account update first
securityUpdateNotice: For account safety, system access is paused until this update is complete.
securityUpdatePasswordOnly: Only your password needs to be updated. No email code is required.
securityUpdateFirstLoginHint: First login requires a new password and email verification for the new address.
securityUpdateAdminEmailHint: The built-in super administrator must set a new password and email. No code is required.
securityUpdateReloginHint: After submitting, your current session will expire and you will sign in with the new password.
passwordResetNotice: An administrator reset your password. Set a new password known only to you.
passwordExpiredNotice: Your password has exceeded the configured validity period. Update it to continue.
firstLoginNotice: Imported accounts must update their password and email, then verify the new email.
defaultAdminNotice: The default super administrator must change both password and email on first login. No email code is required.
securityUpdateSuccess: Account security details updated. Please sign in again
oauthBindingRequired: Bind or create a NetLab account first
oauthBindingSubtitle: {{provider}} identity verified. Choose the NetLab account to link.
oauthAccountRequired: Please enter a username or email
twoFactorSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactorSessionExpired: Two-factor session expired. Please sign in again
twoFactorForceSubtitle: Your organization requires two-factor authentication. Please set it up to continue.
twoFactorRecoveryInvalid: Recovery code invalid or already used
